name: Ayesha Rahman
bio: Met in first year of university during orientation week. We bonded over our shared love of Bengali literature and late-night adda sessions.

name: Tanvir Ahmed
bio: My senior at the office who taught me everything about system design. He always has time to review my code and give constructive feedback.

name: Nusrat Jahan
bio: We grew up in the same neighborhood in Sylhet. Despite living far apart now, we always pick up right where we left off whenever we meet.

name: Rafiul Islam
bio: Lived together for 3 years in the university dorm. He introduced me to programming and we built our first project together during a 48-hour hackathon.

name: Sabrina Hossain
bio: My favorite cousin who lives in Dhaka. She is a doctor and always gives me free medical advice. We used to spend every Eid together as kids.

name: Imran Chowdhury
bio: We worked together on the same product team for two years. He is the best designer I know and has a sharp eye for user experience details.

name: Maliha Sultana
bio: We studied together for every major exam in our CS degree. Her notes were legendary and she never refused to help anyone who was struggling.

name: Zubair Hassan
bio: My best friend from secondary school. We used to play cricket every afternoon. He moved to Canada two years ago but we try to stay connected.
